name: Jellied Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Kiwi fruit, peeled and sliced crosswise
1 Pear, cored, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch squares
2 Tangerines, peeled and sectioned, membrane removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Put water in a small pan. Sprinkle gelatin over it and let soak for 5-10 minutes.
2. Place the pan over moderately low heat, stirring occasionally until the gelatin has melted. Do not allow it to boil or the gelatin will not set.
3. Pour the orange juice, lemon juice, sugar, and melted gelatin into a bowl and mix thoroughly.
4. Coat the bottom of a 6-cup ring mold with the orange jelly. Add about half the kiwi fruit so their edges just touch. Refrigerate for about 10-15 minutes, or until set.
5. While the jelly is setting, peel the grapes, slice them lengthwise, and remove seeds. Mix all the remaining fruits into the liquid jelly.
6. Pour or spoon the mixture into the ring mold and refrigerate several hours or overnight until set.
7. Unmold onto a serving dish. Garnish the center with additional fresh fruit if desired.
8. Serves 6 to 8
